name: Shinjuku Prince Hotel
description: Right in the heart of Shinjuku, offering excellent transit access and skyline views.

name: Capsule Hotel Anshin Oyado
description: A luxury capsule experience with private sleeping pods, complimentary amenities, and a hot spring bath.

name: Park Hyatt Tokyo
description: An iconic 5-star hotel hovering above Shinjuku, famous for luxury service and cinematic views.

name: Hôtel Regina Louvre
description: Classic Parisian elegance directly opposite the Louvre Museum and Tuileries Gardens.

name: Generator Hostel Paris
description: Chic, social hostel in the 10th Arrondissement, close to Canal Saint-Martin.

name: Hôtel Caron de Beaumarchais
description: A charming 18th-century style boutique hotel located in the historical Marais district.

name: Hotel Artemide
description: Highly rated boutique lodging on Via Nazionale with stellar service and a rooftop garden.

name: The Beehive
description: A cozy, clean, and green hostel/guesthouse near Termini Station, focusing on community.

name: Hotel de Russie
description: Rome's ultimate luxury retreat located between the Spanish Steps and Piazza del Popolo.

name: CitizenM Tower of London
description: Modern smart rooms featuring wall-to-wall windows and incredible views of Tower Bridge.

name: Astor Museum Hostel
description: Budget hostel situated directly opposite the British Museum in historic Bloomsbury.

name: The Savoy
description: Legendary luxury hotel on the River Thames, hosting royals and legends for over a century.

name: Pod 39 Hotel
description: Micro-rooms with high-tech designs in Murray Hill, perfect for budget-conscious explorers.

name: The Standard High Line
description: Hovering above the High Line Park in the Meatpacking District, with floor-to-ceiling windows.

name: The Plaza
description: An emblem of historic New York luxury flanking Central Park South.

name: Ubud Tropical Garden
description: Beautiful traditional rooms overlooking rice fields, located in central Ubud.

name: Bambu Indah
description: An eco-luxury retreat in Ubud featuring restored antique Javanese teak homes.

name: The Edge Bali
description: Ultra-luxury villas perched on a 150-meter cliff above the Indian Ocean in Uluwatu.

name: Sydney Harbour YHA
description: Built above archaeological remains in The Rocks, featuring a rooftop view of the Harbour.

name: Ovolo Woolloomooloo
description: A design-forward hotel inside a historic finger wharf, blending heritage and rock-and-roll style.

name: Park Hyatt Sydney
description: The pinnacle of Sydney waterfront luxury, situated directly opposite the Opera House.
